problemSection.title: The Hidden Cost of AI in Software Development

1.title: 📉 LOW TRUST
1.description: 43% of developers don't fully trust AI-generated code. Result: excessive manual review or, worse, deployment without proper validation.

2.title: 🎓 LACK OF TRAINING
2.description: 42% of companies don't invest in AI training. High-performing teams invest 57% in training, vs. only 20% of low performers.

3.title: 🛡️ SECURITY AND PRIVACY RISK
3.description: 40% of leaders cite security as their main concern. Sensitive code can leak to external models without adequate governance controls.

problemSection.stat: 64% of CEOs state: AI success depends more on PEOPLE than technology.

solutionSection.title: CodeQuality AI doesn't replace your team. It empowers them.

1.title: QUALITY GOVERNANCE
1.description: Automated rules of DDD, Clean Code, TDD and Hexagonal Architecture applied to AI-generated code.

2.title: VISIBILITY FOR DECISION MAKERS
2.description: Executive dashboards that translate technical quality into business metrics (ROI, risk, time-to-market).
2.benefit: CEO/GPM understands impact without technical jargon

3.title: PRIVACY-BY-DESIGN
3.description: Automatic anonymization, encryption and on-premise deployment option for regulated environments (fintech, healthcare, gov).

4.title: INTEGRATED TRAINING
4.description: Quick guides, PRP templates and onboarding workshops to elevate team maturity in AI.
4.benefit: 57% more investment in training = high performance

qualificationForm.privacyNote: 🔐 Your data is secure. We don't send spam. Source code is NOT collected.
qualificationForm.successMessage: Diagnosis generated successfully! You will receive the results soon.

1.question: Does CodeQuality AI replace GitHub Copilot?
1.answer: No! We're complementary. Copilot generates code, we ensure that code follows quality standards (DDD, Clean Code, architecture) and we provide executive visibility into the risks and benefits of AI in your team.

2.question: Do you store or use our code?
2.answer: NO. We implement Privacy-by-Design from day one. Your source code is never collected, stored or used to train models. Only aggregated and anonymized metrics are processed to generate your diagnosis.

3.question: Does it work for regulated sectors (fintech, healthcare, gov)?
3.answer: Yes! We offer on-premise deployment option, end-to-end encryption and native LGPD/GDPR compliance. Perfect for environments with strict sensitive data restrictions.

4.question: How long to receive the diagnosis?
4.answer: The report is generated within about 2 minutes after submitting the form. You will receive an executive PDF with score, identified risks, action plan and practical guides via email.

5.question: Is it really free?
5.answer: Yes, the initial diagnosis is 100% free and without commitment. We're in validation phase and seeking feedback from technical leaders to improve our product. If you want to implement the complete solution, we'll discuss paid plans later.

6.question: Do you offer training?
6.answer: Yes! In addition to the governance platform, we offer onboarding workshops, PRP (Pull Request Protocol) templates and quick guides to capacitate your entire team — from junior to senior — to work safely using generative AI.
